Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Dolores Mackinnin'S Witness Statement
Off Calendar Jul-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christine Lee for defendant and moving party: Bocce Cafe and Welat Yuksel
David Rouda for plaintiff and opposing party: Kathleen Baldanzi

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel production of third party witness documents is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Dolores McKinnon is ordered to produce all statements and / or written notes that she prepared relating to the incident. Said statements are not protected by the attorney work-product privilege. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
